CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-31-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE JUN-11-2019 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASSIS, NIMER NUSHWAT, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RECE RIVER CORP. RUIZ, MARK $934.24 INTEREST, $760.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,694.24, SEE SCANNED DOC - THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFFS NIMER MASSIS AND JENNIFER NUSHWAT DEPOSITED $10,000.00 OF THEIR OWN FUNDS INTO ESCROW WITH FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY IN ANTICIPATING PURCHASE OF THE PHAT PHILLY RESTAURANT BELONGING TO DEFENDANTS, BUT THAT THE CONTRACT NEGOTIATIONS DID NOT RESULT IN A SALE OR IN ANY BINDING CONTRACT OR ANY CONTRACTUAL OBLIGATION ON THE PART OF PLAINTIFFS TOWARD THE DEFENDANTS; THAT THE PLAINTIFFS ARE THE SOLE OWNERS OF SAID FUNDS; THAT THE DEFENDANTS HAVE NO BONA FIDE CLAIM TO SAID FUNDS. FURTHERMORE, FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY IS ORDERED TO RELEASE SAID FUNDS FORTHWITH TO PLAINTIFFS.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2019 Off Calendar

Application Package For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-18-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Rece River Corp. and Mark Ruiz.
Dept. 514. Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

George S. Wynn, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Nimer Massis, and for plaintiff Jennifer Nushway, who was not present for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendants Rece River Corp. or Mark Ruiz.
Plaintiff's complaint for Declaratory Relief was filed on November 14, 2018, and personally served on defendants Rece River Corp. and Mark Ruiz on December 3, 2018.
Defaults as to defendants Rece River Corp. and Mark Ruiz were entered on January 17, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on April 10, 2019.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Fidelity National Title Company was filed with the Clerk's Office on April 10, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Nimer Massis and Jennifer Nushway, and against the Defaulted Defendants Rece River Corp. and Mark Ruiz, as follows:

Prejudgment Interest - $934.24.
Costs - $760.00.

Total - $1,694.24.

Additionally, the Court finds that plaintiffs Nimer Massis and Jennifer Nushwat deposited $10,000.00 of their own funds into escrow with Fidelity National Title Company in anticipating purchase of the Phat Philly Restaurant belonging to defendants, but that the contract negotiations did not result in a sale or in any binding contract or any contractual obligation on the part of plaintiffs toward the defendants; that the plaintiffs are the sole owners of said funds; that the defendants have no bona fide claim to said funds. Furthermore, Fidelity National Title Company is ORDERED to release said funds forthwith to plaintiffs.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-21-2019 Continued To Jul-31-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-11-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-18-858880 WITH CASE CGC-18-571523
Off Calendar Jan-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Ruiz, 510-673-7245 Defendant in Pro Per.
No other appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant reports he did not contest by email, did not file any papers and prevailed on the small claims action. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF NIMER MASSIS, JENNIFER NUSHWAT'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-18-858880 WITH CASE CGC-18-571523.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. The motion to consolidate is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Case CGC-18-571523 is consolidated with CSM-18-858880 for all purposes. The court designates CGC-18-571523 as the lead action and all future filings shall be made in that case. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-18-858880 WITH CASE CGC-18-571523
Off Calendar Dec-20-2018 Continued To Jan-18-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
